div.p: Integration test scenarios for SWIM failure detection
• All remaining nodes detect DEAD • Detection within: suspicion_timeout + 3*protocol_period • Refutation if false positive
• Both sides accept writes (A/P) • After heal: LWW resolution • Convergence within: 5 * anti_entropy_interval
• False positive rate < 1% • Indirect probing reduces errors • Refutation catches false SUSPECT
• System survives continuous failures • Convergence after chaos stops • No permanent state divergence
